channel.title: BFCWE APIs on BF Website
channel.description: Recent content in BFCWE APIs on BF Website

item.title: BFCWEs API
item.description: BFCWEs API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The BFCWEs APP/API generates datasets of BFCWE Specifications as <cause, operation>→consequence BF Weaknesses. Depending on the level of abstraction, some CWEs may be covered by more than one BF Weakness Triple. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFCWE.xml https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFCWE.json API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.

item.title: BFCWE Files API
item.description: BFCWE Files API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The BFCWE Files APP/API generates BF Weakness Specifications in .bfw format. BF .bfv Specifications Download https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFCWE/BFFiles BF PATENT PENDING U.S. Patent Application No. PCT/US2025/038662 Bugs Framework (BF): A System for Formal Specification of Cybersecurity Weaknesses and Vulnerabilities, Definition of Secure Coding Principles, and Generation of Weakness and Vulnerability Datasets and Vulnerability Classifications. Inventor: Irena Bojanova, NIST.

item.title: CWE2BF Graphs API
BFCWE Graphs API
item.description: BFCWE Graphs API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //To be added// BF PATENT PENDING U.S. Patent Application No. PCT/US2025/038662 Bugs Framework (BF): A System for Formal Specification of Cybersecurity Weaknesses and Vulnerabilities, Definition of Secure Coding Principles, and Generation of Weakness and Vulnerability Datasets and Vulnerability Classifications. Inventor: Irena Bojanova, NIST. BF CITATION: Bojanova I (2024) Bugs Framework (BF): Formalizing Cybersecurity Weaknesses and Vulnerabilities.

item.title: BFCWE Types API
item.description: BFCWE Types API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //To be added// BF PATENT PENDING U.S. Patent Application No. PCT/US2025/038662 Bugs Framework (BF): A System for Formal Specification of Cybersecurity Weaknesses and Vulnerabilities, Definition of Secure Coding Principles, and Generation of Weakness and Vulnerability Datasets and Vulnerability Classifications. Inventor: Irena Bojanova, NIST. BF CITATION: Bojanova I (2024) Bugs Framework (BF): Formalizing Cybersecurity Weaknesses and Vulnerabilities.
